title: MLF Chandigarh Recruitment 2026, Application Form And Apply Now -
how_to_apply: Download the Form: visit the official website https://militaryliteraturefestival.com/ Fill the form in BLOCK CAPITAL letters carefully, and provide accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, Fee Receipt , and age proof (Aadhar, PAN, etc.). Attach the combined PDF file and click Send. Send Application Form: festcoordinator.mlf@gmail.com MLF Chandigarh Recruitment 2026
jobs_info: MLF Chandigarh Recruitment 2026: Military Literature Festival Association Chandigarh has issued a notification for the position of Sevadar cum Safaiwala. The recruitment drive comprises one vacancy. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 31-05-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the MLF Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
